positive: Synthwave aesthetic illustration featuring a neon-lit Miami cityscape at sunset. Include geometric grids, palm trees, and a stylized sports car driving towards a glowing horizon. Vibrant magenta, cyan, and electric blue color palette. Retro-futurism, vaporwave art, 80s album cover style, highly detailed digital painting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, muddy colors, realistic people, grunge
